wordplay_note: Woman whose cancer prompts Fat's theological crisis
card_description: Sherri Solvig is a character in Philip K. Dick's *VALIS*. Cancer patient whose suffering and death challenge Fat's belief in a benevolent VALIS. Name note: Woman whose cancer prompts Fat's theological crisis. Theodicy — if God is real why does Sherri die?. First appears in *VALIS*.

reference.brief: Cancer patient whose suffering and death challenge Fat's belief in a benevolent VALIS
reference.significance: Theodicy — if God is real why does Sherri die?
